actions.name: Jaw Lock
actions.description: Effect: On hit, the user auto-succeeds on a @Affliction[grapple] Maneuver check against the target, and target also becomes @Affliction[bound]. This @Affliction[bound] effect can only be removed with a Challenging Lift or Survival Skill Check taken as a Simple Action. If either the @Affliction[grapple] or @Affliction[bound] condition ends, the target loses the other condition.
